name: sidekick
description: Sidekick — a collection of AI coding agents as Codex sidekicks. Forge and Kay are the first two: each sidekick auto-installs, configures itself, and lets Codex delegate coding work while Codex stays focused on planning and communication. The Codex-facing workflow bodies are generated from skills into agents/codex.

interface.shortDescription: AI coding-agent sidekick workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Sidekick packages the Codex-specific generated Sidekick workflows while keeping the canonical source of truth in the main Sidekick repository's skills directory.
defaultPrompt: Use Sidekick to coordinate implementation work.
